sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_users (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), email VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_users (id, name, email) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 'alice@example.com'), (2, 'Bob', NULL), (3, NULL, 'charlie@example.com');
SELECT explain(CONCAT('SELECT * FROM test_users WHERE email IS NULL AND id IN (SELECT id FROM test_users WHERE name IS NOT NULL);', '-' || bif:crc64(name))) AS explanation;
SELECT bif:crc64(COALESCE(name, 'No Name')) AS user_hash FROM test_users;
SELECT explain('SELECT name, COUNT(*) FROM test_users GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;', -1);
SELECT explain('SELECT a.id, a.name, b.email FROM test_users a JOIN (SELECT id, email FROM test_users WHERE email IS NOT NULL) b ON a.id = b.id;', 0);
SELECT name, explain(AVG(LENGTH(email))) AS avg_email_length FROM test_users GROUP BY name HAVING LENGTH(name) > 3;
CREATE TABLE test_orders (order_id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT, amount DECIMAL(10, 2), order_date TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES test_users(id));
INSERT INTO test_orders (order_id, user_id, amount) VALUES (1, 1, 100.00), (2, 1, NULL), (3, 2, 250.50);
SELECT explain('SELECT u.name, o.amount FROM test_users u LEFT JOIN test_orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.order_date IS NULL;', 0);
SELECT explain('SELECT DISTINCT u.name, bif:crc64(CONVERT(o.amount, VARCHAR)) FROM test_users u JOIN test_orders o ON u.id = o.user_id;', -1);
SELECT explain('SELECT u.name, SUM(o.amount) FROM test_users u JOIN test_orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.amount IS NOT NULL GROUP BY u.name HAVING SUM(o.amount) > 0;', 1);
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_test (col1 INT, col2 VARCHAR(50));
SELECT explain('SELECT bif:crc64(col2 || " - " || COALESCE(TO_STRING(col1), "Zero")) FROM temp_test;', -2);
SELECT explain('SELECT a.name, SUM(b.amount) FROM test_users a JOIN test_orders b ON a.id = b.user_id WHERE b.amount IS NOT NULL GROUP BY a.name ORDER BY SUM(b.amount) DESC;', -3);
